description: Live, DB-backed, no-code-deploy delivery kill switch for governed Discord targets (best-bets, trader-insights, exclusive-insights), plus a fail-loud ops alert webhook health check.

sha_binding.verified_source_note: Down-migration script commit — last commit to touch non-proof paths (db/migrations-rollback/20260714120000_add_delivery_kill_switch.down.sql).

runtime_proof.note: database.types.ts regenerated for real against an applied migration on an isolated Supabase dev branch (created, migrated, typed, then deleted). Verified byte-identical output before/after.

receipts.note: Live Supabase smoke passed. No production DB writes by this lane; type regeneration used a temporary isolated dev branch, deleted after use.
